_meta.note: FIFA World Cup 2026 — group-stage fixtures Jun 11-26. Real teams per official draw. Times are local-to-venue ISO with offset. Knockout fixtures will be filled in once seeds resolve. Edit/import via admin.html.
_meta.schedule_source: Sky Sports day-by-day breakdown, verified against fifa.com
_meta.knockout_note: R32 placeholder slots use group-position labels (e.g. 1A = winner of Group A, 3A/D/E/F = best-third from any of those four groups). Admin should replace TBD team names with actual teams once the group stage concludes.

matches.venue: Levi's Stadium, San Francisco Bay Area
